title: PTC Introduces Onshape-Arena Connection to Accelerate Product Development and Supply Chain Collaboration
text: New functionality for Onshape and Arena connects cloud-native CAD, PDM, and PLM Instant sharing of product data between systems with the click of a button Engineering and supply chain teams can collaborate and iterate on product designs earlier in the design process BOSTON , Sept. 13, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- PTC (NASDAQ: PTC) today announced the availability of the Onshape-Arena Connection, a new functionality that connects its cloud-native Onshape ® product development and Arena ® product lifecycle management (PLM) solutions.
